transcript:
CALLER: Namaste, mujhe ENT specialist se milna hai. Appointment mil sakta hai?
AGENT: Namaste! Haan, zaroor. Aapka naam aur number please?
CALLER: Deepak Shinde. 9876501234.
AGENT: Shukriya Deepak ji. Humara ENT specialist Dr. Arun Mahajan hai. Unka agle Somvaar aur Mangalvaar ko slot available hai.
CALLER: Somvaar theek rahega. Subah ka koi slot hai?
AGENT: Haan, Somvaar subah 10 AM aur 11:30 AM available hai.
CALLER: 10 baje book kar dijiye.
AGENT: Ho gaya. Deepak Shinde, Somvaar 10:00 AM, Dr. Arun Mahajan. Confirmation SMS milega. Aur kuch chahiye?
CALLER: Nahi, bahut dhanyawaad.
